scripts.build:moon:wasm: cd moon/rhodonite_examples && moon build --target wasm --release src/ecs-mass-cubes/wasm/main
scripts.build:moon:wasm-gc: cd moon/rhodonite_examples && moon build --target wasm-gc --release src/ecs-mass-cubes/wasm/main
scripts.dev:native:basic-triangle: cd moon/rhodonite_examples && moon run --target native --release src/basic-triangle/wgpu/main
scripts.dev:native:triangle-with-buffer: cd moon/rhodonite_examples && moon run --target native --release src/triangle-with-buffer/wgpu/main
scripts.dev:native:depth-test: cd moon/rhodonite_examples && moon run --target native --release src/depth-test/wgpu/main
scripts.dev:native:ecs-scene-graph: cd moon/rhodonite_examples && moon run --target native --release src/ecs-scene-graph/wgpu/main
scripts.dev:native:ecs-mass-cubes: cd moon/rhodonite_examples && moon run --target native --release src/ecs-mass-cubes/wgpu/main
scripts.build: pnpm run build:moon && pnpm run build:moon:wasm && pnpm run build:moon:wasm-gc && pnpm run build:core:js && tsc && vite build
scripts.test:core:js: pnpm run build:core:js && vitest run moon/rhodonite_core/src/math/ts moon/rhodonite_core/src/ecs/ts
